message:
chore(beads): close ACFS/tooling vNext epic and remaining child tasks

Marks the bd-2n73 epic (Gateway + private sync with ACFS/tooling vNext)
as closed now that all child tasks are complete:
- bd-2n73.12 (secrets/config for new tools): public-side secure loading
  hooks with multi-source secret resolution, 16 tests
- bd-2n73.13 (manifest overrides + environment mapping): overlay
  infrastructure with env-specific overrides, 32 tests

Both tasks deliver public-repo infrastructure that the private repo
plugs into via FLYWHEEL_PRIVATE_DIR. The parent epic is closed with
all 16 children completed (manifest parser, TOON parser, registry
compat layer, install plan, private overlay, E2E tests, Agent Mail
integration, docs/OpenAPI, etc.).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
